if(NOT IREE_ROCM_TEST_TARGET_CHIP MATCHES "^gfx")
  return()
endif()

iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_library(
  NAME
    backends
  SRCS
    "backends.cc"
  DEPS
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::cts2::util::registry
    iree::hal::drivers::hip::registration
  TESTONLY
  ALWAYSLINK
  PUBLIC
)

iree_hal_cts2_testdata(
  FORMAT_NAME
    hip
  TARGET_DEVICE
    "hip"
  IDENTIFIER
    "iree_cts_testdata_hip"
  BACKEND_NAME
    "hip"
  FORMAT_STRING
    [=["HSACO"]=]
  TESTDATA_DIR
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/cts2/testdata"
  FLAGS
    "--iree-rocm-target=${IREE_ROCM_TEST_TARGET_CHIP}"
)

iree_hal_cts2_test_suite(
  BACKENDS_LIB
    ::backends
  TESTDATA_LIBS
    ::testdata_hip_lib
  NAME
    stream
  ARGS
    "--hip_use_streams=true"
  LABELS
    "driver=hip"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
)

iree_hal_cts2_test_suite(
  BACKENDS_LIB
    ::backends
  TESTDATA_LIBS
    ::testdata_hip_lib
  NAME
    graph
  ARGS
    "--hip_use_streams=false"
  LABELS
    "driver=hip"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
)
